channel.description: DedSec Project — privacy, security, and practical tech guides.

item.title: Technology Essentials (2026): What It Is, Why It Matters, and How to Start
item.description: A clear 2026 starter map for Technology: definitions, real-world examples, risks and a simple path to begin learning.

item.title: Technology Practical Guide (2026): Checklist, Tools, and Common Mistakes
item.description: A practical, step-by-step checklist for Technology: how to set goals, choose tools, practice safely and avoid common traps.
